paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.58, with a change of -1.05% from the prior close and -24.28% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 22, 2026.

There have been no new news headlines in the last 24 hours, but recent news includes a story from The Globe and Mail about a Fermi Inc. director resigning amid a governance dispute. The resignation was also disclosed in an 8-K filing on July 13 and an 8-K/A filing on July 21, which included a response letter from the resigned director.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K on July 15 disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and a SCHEDULE 13G filing on July 20. There has been one Form 4 filing, and four new social posts have been made in the last 24 hours, although they appear to be about other companies, including Google and OpenAI.
